sections.paragraph: ἀπελπίζω [ἀπό, ἐλπίζω] abs. ‘experience loss of hope’, despair Eph 4:19 v.l. In Lk 6:35, if the nt. μηδέν is read, auditors (readers) are cautioned against reluctance about lending, and one can render without expectation of getting anything back. If μηδένα is read vs. 35 v.l., the sense appears to be without causing anyone to lose heart because of being considered a poor risk.
